description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 11, 2026 at 9:29 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving a pickup truck on S. Harvard Boulevard near James M. Wood Boulevard. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northbound on Harvard Boulevard in autonomous mode when it came to a stop, and then reversed into a 
vacant space at the curb in between a parked passenger car and a pickup truck. The test driver of the Waymo AV then transitioned to 
manual mode and reversed, and the rear of the Waymo AV made contact with the front of a pickup truck parked directly behind the Waymo 
AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual 
mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
